recommendations.title: Metalhead
recommendations.overview: A young girl in 1990s Iceland is caught between the life that took her brother and her own inability to strike out on her own. In her grief, she finds solace in metal and dreams of making her own music.

recommendations.title: Heartstone
recommendations.overview: A remote fishing village in Iceland. Teenage boys Thór and Kristján experience a turbulent summer as one tries to win the heart of a girl while the other discovers new feelings toward his best friend. When summer ends and the harsh nature of Iceland

recommendations.title: Retreat
recommendations.overview: Kate and Martin escape from personal tragedy to an Island Retreat. Cut off from the outside world, their attempts to recover are shattered when a man is washed ashore, with news of airborne killer disease that is sweeping through Europe.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: Out of the Past
recommendations.overview: The peaceful life of a gas station owner is disrupted when a man from his past arrives in town and forces him to return to the dark world he had tried to escape.

recommendations.title: Blancanieves
recommendations.overview: A black and white silent movie, based on the Snow White fairy tale, that is set in a romantic version of 1920s Seville and centered on a female bullfighter.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: An Elephant Sitting Still
recommendations.overview: In the northern Chinese city of Manzhouli, they say there is an elephant that simply sits and ignores the world. Manzhouli becomes an obsession for the protagonists of this film, a longed-for escape from the downward spiral in which they find themsel

recommendations.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
recommendations.overview: After the Evil Queen marries the King, she performs a violent coup in which the King is murdered and his daughter, Snow White, is taken captive. Almost a decade later, a grown Snow White is still in the clutches of the Queen. In order to obtain immor

recommendations.title: Blind Horizon
recommendations.overview: Left for dead in the remote Southwest, Frank is found clinging to life and in a state of amnesia. As he recovers, ominous memories begin to flash back...
